title: OperationResult
description: Final result payload for a completed or terminal long-running aascribe operation.

data.description: Inline final payload for small operation results. Omitted when output_id is present.

output_id.description: Managed output id for oversized final payloads. Use output show/head/tail/slice to inspect it.

truncated.description: True when the final payload is stored through output_id instead of embedded inline.
